description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, lace collar in-seam with a lee badge appliqued onto the inner collar, and multi-coloured merging print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Live the colours of life in style in this cotton t-shirt from lee. Stylish to the hilt, it looks great with jeans and skirts when teamed with sleek, heeled sandals.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
